# hetzner-robot_server_order (Resource)

Orders a Hetzner dedicated server (`POST /order/server/transaction`).

~> **Billing / irreversibility.** By default `test = true`, which only *validates* the order — no server is provisioned and no charge is made. Set `test = false` to place a **real, billable** order. Provisioning is asynchronous, so `server_number` / `server_ip` populate once the order is ready. **Destroying this resource does NOT cancel the server** — cancel it separately via Hetzner Robot.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner-robot_server_products" "available" {}

resource "hetzner-robot_server_order" "worker" {
  product_id      = "EX44"
  location        = "FSN1"
  dist            = "Ubuntu 24.04 LTS minimal"
  lang            = "en"
  authorized_keys = ["aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff:00:11:22:33:44:55:66:77:88:99"]

  test = true # set to false to place a real, billable order
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `product_id` (String) Product ID to order (see the hetzner-robot_server_products data source)

### Optional

- `addons` (List of String) Product add-on IDs
- `authorized_keys` (List of String) SSH key fingerprints authorized on the ordered server
- `dist` (String) Distribution/OS to preinstall
- `lang` (String) Installation language
- `location` (String) Datacenter location (e.g. FSN1)
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Root password (alternative to authorized_keys)
- `test` (Boolean) If true (default), validate the order only — no server is provisioned and no charge is made. Set to false to place a real, billable order.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `server_ip` (String) Assigned primary IP (once provisioned)
- `server_number` (Number) Assigned server number (once provisioned)
- `status` (String) Order status
- `transaction_id` (String) Order transaction ID
